title: Blueprint Phase Verification Model
description: Model-authored payload for phase.verification. Runtime-owned phase identity, artifact kind, paths, completed summary inventory, and final Markdown persistence are supplied by MCP tools.

coverageSummary.description: Single-line summary rendered in the top Validation Summary metadata.

signOff.description: Single-line sign-off text rendered in metadata and the Gate State section.

validationSummary.description: Concrete validation observations rendered as Markdown bullets.

requirementCoverage.description: Requirement and task coverage rows rendered into the Requirement / Task Coverage Markdown table.

evidenceReviewedSummaryPaths.description: Repo-relative completed execution summary artifacts reviewed during validation.

evidenceMetadata.description: Concrete test, command, harness, artifact, or infrastructure metadata rendered as Markdown bullets.

manualOrDeferredCoverage.description: Manual-only or deferred coverage rows rendered into a Markdown table. Use an explicit NONE row when no manual or deferred coverage remains.

gapClassification.description: Gap classification rows rendered into a Markdown table. Use an explicit none row when no gaps remain.

gapsFound.description: Concrete gaps or a single explicit none value rendered as Markdown bullets.

suggestedRepairs.description: Concrete repairs or a single explicit none value rendered as Markdown bullets.

nextSafeAction.description: One single-line Blueprint command token with optional arguments. The task schema may narrow this to the allowed next actions for the current phase.

nonEmptyString.description: Non-empty single-line string with at least one non-whitespace character. CR/LF is rejected because model strings are rendered into Markdown metadata, bullets, or tables.

markdownTableCellString.description: Non-empty single-line Markdown table cell with at least one non-whitespace character. CR/LF and pipe delimiters are rejected to prevent table shape changes.

phaseSummaryPath.description: Repo-relative Blueprint execution summary path under .blueprint/phases with no traversal, absolute path, backslash, glob, or table delimiter surface.

blueprintCommandAction.description: Single Blueprint command token plus optional tokenized arguments. Natural-language wrapping, backticks, pipes, and multi-line text are rejected.
